description: Stanford University's official multi-layout presentation template. Balances institutional authority with visual flexibility — one master drives 21 distinct layouts spanning title slides, content, data, dividers, and closing. The most fully-featured of the four templates.

visual_style.density: moderate — layouts range from text-heavy to data-forward
visual_style.color_weight: white-dominant with cardinal red accents; dividers use the full brand palette
visual_style.imagery_style: photography in designated image placeholders; clean iconography from PowerPoint's Insert > Icons library per Stanford Identity Guide

critical_notes: 16:10 aspect ratio (10×6.25in) — NOT standard 16:9. Optimized for MacBook displays and office monitors.
Do not add fonts beyond Georgia (headlines) and Calibri (body). Template instructions explicitly prohibit additional fonts.
Do not add colors outside the pre-defined brand palette. See brand_colors in theme.json.
For icons, use PowerPoint's Insert > Icons library following the Stanford Identity Guide Iconography page.
avoid_for: External marketing/pitch decks needing non-Stanford branding
Presentations requiring a fully dark or bold aesthetic (use Castro)

font_requirements.headline: Georgia
font_requirements.note: Georgia, Calibri, and Calibri Light are all widely available on Windows and macOS. No additional fonts should be added per template guidelines.

asset_placeholders.image_panels: Sized per layout — see layouts.json for exact px dimensions. Minimum 1920×1080px source images recommended; PPTX will crop to fit.
asset_placeholders.icons: Use PowerPoint Insert > Icons. Follow Stanford Identity Guide Iconography page for style guidance.

brand_color_usage.cardinal_red: Primary brand color — title slides, background accents, stat callouts
brand_color_usage.illuminating_dark: Divider slides — attention-grabbing yellow; use dark text on this background

accessibility.note: Illuminating Dark (#FEC51D) backgrounds require dark text (#2E2C28) — do not use white text on yellow.
